name: SpeechBrain (Speech AI Toolkit)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Mila / Université de Montréal; Yoshua Bengio lab

auth.notes: Local inference; HuggingFace Hub for pretrained models

performance.notes: GPU recommended; speaker verification under 100ms; ASR real-time factor ~0.1x on GPU

agent_readiness.notes: Comprehensive speech AI toolkit from Mila lab. Tasks: ASR, speaker recognition, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, emotion recognition, language identification, spoken language understanding, TTS. Pretrained models on HuggingFace Hub. EncoderClassifier, EncoderASR, SpeakerRecognition interfaces. Recipe-based training for custom models. Used in academic research and production speech pipelines. Particularly strong for speaker verification (ECAPA-TDNN, x-vector models).

gotchas: Recipe-based training system has steep learning curve
Documentation can be inconsistent across tasks
Hyperparameter configuration via YAML is complex
Some models lag behind proprietary SOTA
best_when: Custom ASR model training with labeled data
avoid_when: Simple ASR only (faster-whisper or OpenAI Whisper simpler)
summary: SpeechBrain is Mila's comprehensive speech AI toolkit. Covers ASR, speaker verification, diarization, speech enhancement, emotion recognition, and TTS. Strong pretrained models for speaker identification (ECAPA-TDNN, x-vectors). Recipe-based training for custom models. HuggingFace Hub integration. Best for speaker-related tasks (verification, diarization) where it leads in accuracy. Academic research standard for reproducible speech experiments.
